title: markea viridiflora
intro: Markea viridiflora, also known as the "green markea" or "markea vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignonaceae. It is a tropical vine native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains alkaloids, particularly markeine and markeineine, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Markea viridiflora include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
